title: The Rajiv Gandhi National Aviation University Act, 2013
full_text: The Rajiv Gandhi National Aviation University Act, 2013 राजीव गांधी राष्‍ट्रीय विमानन विश्‍वविद्यालयअधिनियम, 2013 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201326 Act Number: 26 Enactment Date: 2013-09-18 Act Year: 2013 Short Title: The Rajiv Gandhi National Aviation University Act, 2013 Hindi Title: राजीव गांधी राष्‍ट्रीय विमानन विश्‍वविद्यालयअधिनियम, 2013 Long Title: An Act to establish and incorporate a national aviation University to facilitate and promote aviation studies and research to achieve excellence in areas of aviation management, policy, science and technology, aviation environment, training in governing fields of safety and security regulations on aviation and other related fields to produce quality human resources to cater to the needs of the aviation sector and to provide for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Civil Aviation Enforcement Date: 18-11-2013 Notification: 18th November, 2013, vide notification No. S.O. 3446 (E), dated 18th November, 2013, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
